title: melittis melissophyllum subsp. melissophyllum
intro: Melittis melissophyllum subsp. melissophyllum, also known as the honey bag or baggy honey, is a perennial plant species in the family Orobanchaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Melittis melissophyllum subsp. melissophyllum include relieving symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and allergies, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The plant is traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
